title: Epic: Phase B — Clojure direct parse + interactive
description: When Phase A quality peaks: port org-agenda parsing from Elisp to Clojure. Direct file read, no Emacs dependency for reads. Enable user interaction (search, filter, tag exploration). Same UI, different backend.

title: Epic: Phase A — Emacs-way read-only viewer
description: Read-only existence data viewer. Emacs provides data via emacsclient, Clojure caches+serves, WebTUI renders. No user interaction with Emacs. Web handles navigation. Goal: show the thrown existence beautifully. When quality peaks → Phase B (Clojure direct parse).

title: Server scaffold: http-kit + reitit + emacsclient bridge
description: Clojure server with /api/agenda?date= endpoint. emacsclient calls with per-date caching (30s today, 1h past). POST /api/trigger for cache invalidation.
design: http-kit server, reitit router, emacsclient bridge with ConcurrentHashMap cache
acceptance_criteria: Server starts, /api/agenda returns JSON, date param works

title: WebTUI front door: org-agenda day timeline
description: Main page showing today's org-agenda entries. Date navigation (h/l/H/L/t, buttons). WebTUI Catppuccin theme, SF terminal aesthetics. JetBrains Mono font. Entries with time/source/text/tags columns.
notes: CDN URL 수정 (404→200), Catppuccin 다크 정상, GLG-Mono 웹폰트 적용. TRON 커스텀 테마 시도 → 실패 → Catppuccin as-is로 확정.

title: Data panels: existence stats sidebar
description: Show data scale: 3000+ notes, 7000+ bib, 14000+ commits, 696+ journal days, health records. Static or API-driven counts. WebTUI table/badge components.

title: Health + time-tracking data panel
description: Show lifetract data for the viewed date: sleep, steps, heart rate, time categories. Read from lifetract.db via next.jdbc. Display as WebTUI table or simple viz.

title: Git commit timeline for viewed date
description: Show git commits for the current date across repos. Call gitcli or read git log directly. Cross-reference with agenda stamps.

title: Public key section: links, about, agent contact
description: Footer/sidebar with digital garden link, GitHub, Threads. This homepage = public key. Agents and humans can find connection points.

title: Deploy to Oracle VM behind Caddy
description: Deploy geworfen on Oracle VM. Caddy reverse proxy for www.junghanacs.com. Emacs agent-server must be running. Systemd service or similar. rsync org data sync.

title: Mobile responsive layout (ch/lh units)
description: Ensure readable on Galaxy Fold4 and standard mobile. WebTUI ch/lh units help. Max-width 88ch, min font adjustments. Test nav buttons on touch.
